gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, with students clutching resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, with consulting firms stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
